fields.name: Period Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the period that you want to view.

fields.name: Period Start
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date of the period that you want to view.

fields.name: Balance Due (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the balance due, in local currency.

fields.name: Sales (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sales related to the customer, in local currency.

fields.name: Profit (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the profit related to the customer, in local currency.
